kubernetes.description: Kubernetes cluster management via mcp-aggregator (HTTP MCP; mcporter uses streamable-http first, SSE fallback)

argocd.description: ArgoCD GitOps continuous delivery via mcp-aggregator (HTTP MCP; mcporter uses streamable-http first, SSE fallback)

grafana.description: Grafana observability dashboards and alerts via mcp-aggregator (HTTP MCP; mcporter uses streamable-http first, SSE fallback)

gitlab.description: GitLab CI/CD pipelines and repositories via mcp-aggregator (HTTP MCP; mcporter uses streamable-http first, SSE fallback)

archivist.description: Archivist-OSS fleet long-term memory (Qdrant + temporal knowledge graph)

paloalto.description: Palo Alto PAN-OS management via mcp-aggregator (HTTP MCP; SSE path /paloalto/mcp — align aggregator route to paloalto-mcp Service)

brave.description: Brave Search web search (streamable HTTP; set BRAVE_API_KEY; default http://127.0.0.1:8770/mcp)
